sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Blackstone to sell 11 million shares of Legence in offering
feed.summary: Affiliates of Blackstone Inc. are planning to sell 11 million shares of Legence Corp.'s Class A common stock in a secondary public offering. Legence will not receive any proceeds from this sale, although it will cover associated costs except for underwriting discounts. This announcement follows several analyst upgrades for Legence due to strong financial performance, with various firms raising their price targets for the company.

feed.title: [8-K] MCKESSON CORP Reports Material Event
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation's subsidiaries, including McKesson Medical-Surgical Top Holdings, have entered into new senior secured credit facilities totaling $2.0 billion. These facilities comprise two term loans ($750.0M due 2031, $250.0M due 2028) and a $1,000.0 million revolving credit facility maturing in 2031. The loans are secured by substantially all assets of the borrower and certain U.S. subsidiaries, bearing variable interest rates tied to market benchmarks and incorporating customary financial covenants and tests.

feed.title: Leidos Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. (ET)
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS) announced it will host a conference call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company plans to release its quarterly earnings press release before the call. A live and replayed audio broadcast, along with related materials, will be available on the Leidos Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Hologic (NASDAQ: HOLX) CEO exit tied to Blackstone, TPG buyout
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. announced that CEO Steve MacMillan will retire immediately upon the closing of its go-private merger with affiliates of Blackstone and TPG, which is expected around April 7, 2026. All necessary regulatory approvals have been secured for the transaction. MacMillan's 12-year tenure saw significant growth in revenue, EPS, and share price, and his successor is anticipated to be announced upon the merger's completion.

feed.title: Truist Financial Maintains BeiGene(ONC.US) With Buy Rating, Announces Target Price $412
feed.summary: Truist Financial has reaffirmed its Buy rating on BeiGene (ONC.US) and set a target price of $412. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding BeiGene's stock performance.

feed.title: Alliant Energy sets April 30 earnings release, May 1 webcast
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) has scheduled its first-quarter earnings release for Thursday, April 30th, after market close. A conference call to review the results will be held on Friday, May 1st, at 9 a.m. CT, and will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website. The call will be hosted by CEO Lisa Barton and CFO Robert Durian.

feed.title: Leidos will release quarterly results before an 8 a.m. May 5 call
feed.summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) has scheduled its First Quarter 2026 earnings conference call for May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET to report results for the period ending April 3, 2026. The company will issue its quarterly earnings release before the call and provide a live webcast and replay, with an archived version available through May 5, 2027. This announcement follows Leidos's consistent pattern of pre-announcing earnings calls, which have historically led to modest stock price movements.

feed.title: Sleep apnea pill developer gets $150M as U.S. filing nears
feed.summary: Apnimed, a pharmaceutical company, has secured up to $150 million in debt financing from HealthCare Royalty Partners. This funding will support the commercial launch of AD109, an oral pill for obstructive sleep apnea (OSA), pending FDA approval. The company plans to submit a New Drug Application (NDA) for AD109 later this quarter, following positive Phase 3 trial results.

feed.title: Gartner's June cyber summit brings 62 experts, 110+ sessions on AI
feed.summary: Gartner has announced its Security & Risk Management Summit, scheduled for June 1-3, 2026, in National Harbor, MD. The event will feature 62 Gartner experts and over 110 research-driven sessions, focusing on how cybersecurity leaders can adapt to AI, navigate an expanding threat landscape, and address critical organizational challenges. Key topics include AI in cybersecurity, risk management, cloud security, and identity and access management.

feed.title: CrowdStrike’s managed detection service drew a 98% recommend score
feed.summary: CrowdStrike has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Managed Detection and Response (MDR) report. Their Falcon Complete service achieved a 98% willingness to recommend score, based on customer feedback highlighting its 24/7 expert monitoring, AI-driven threat detection, and rapid remediation capabilities. CrowdStrike emphasizes its "Agentic MDR" approach, combining human expertise with intelligent automation to combat AI-powered cyber threats effectively.

feed.title: NiCE is the Only Vendor Named a Gartner Customers’ Choice in Voice of the Customer for Contact Center as a Service Report
feed.summary: NiCE has been recognized for the third time as the only vendor named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer for Contact Center as a Service (CCaaS) report. This distinction is based on excellent customer feedback, with NiCE receiving an overall rating of 4.6 out of 5 from 82 reviews, and 86% of customers recommending the company. Jeff Comstock, President of CX Product & Technology at NiCE, highlighted the company's commitment to innovation and reliable enterprise-grade AI as key to fostering customer confidence and significant results.

feed.title: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co Has $678,000 Stake in Honeywell International Inc. $HON
feed.summary: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co significantly reduced its stake in Honeywell International Inc. by 58.6% in Q4, now holding 3,476 shares valued at $678,000. Despite this, other institutional investors have increased their positions in Honeywell. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating expectations, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with insider selling also noted.

feed.title: Hologic's CEO will retire as Blackstone-TPG buyout nears close
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. announced that its long-time Chairman, President, and CEO, Steve MacMillan, will retire upon the closing of its go-private transaction with Blackstone and TPG. The transaction is expected to close around April 7, 2026, after receiving all necessary regulatory approvals. MacMillan led Hologic for over 12 years, during which the company saw significant growth in revenue, non-GAAP earnings per share, share price, and workforce.

feed.title: Suriname offshore plan starts early with Halliburton, PETRONAS and Valaris
feed.summary: Halliburton has announced a Strategic Collaboration Agreement with PETRONAS Suriname Exploration & Production BV and Valaris to support the development of PETRONAS Suriname’s assets. This collaboration aims for early engagement in the development lifecycle to enhance project readiness, execution performance, and long-term value creation. The partnership leverages PETRONAS Suriname’s basin expertise, Valaris’ offshore drilling capabilities, and Halliburton’s technology and execution strengths for effective planning and execution.

feed.title: Halliburton forms collaboration with PETRONAS Suriname and Valaris
feed.summary: Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) has partnered with PETRONAS Suriname Exploration & Production BV and Valaris to develop PETRONAS Suriname's local assets. This collaboration aims to integrate their respective expertise early in the development lifecycle to enhance project readiness, execution performance, and value creation in Suriname. The agreement focuses on combining PETRONAS Suriname's basin knowledge, Valaris' drilling capabilities, and Halliburton's technology to maximize the asset's long-term value.

feed.title: 10 high schools get financial literacy labs in Synchrony’s $2M push
feed.summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) has committed an additional $2 million to its Empowering Financial Futures program, bringing the total funding to $3 million. This initiative will establish 10 Financial Literacy Labs in high schools, provide $1 million for teacher development and resources, and nearly $1 million for free financial counseling services for public school teachers. The program aims to enhance K-12 personal finance education nationwide, partnering with various nonprofits and utilizing employee volunteers.

feed.title: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co Acquires Shares of 9,811 Emerson Electric Co. $EMR
feed.summary: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co has acquired a new position of 9,811 shares in Emerson Electric Co. (NYSE:EMR) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $1.302 million and making it the 27th largest holding in their portfolio. Several research firms have issued positive ratings and raised price targets for Emerson Electric, with a consensus target price of $163.43. The company also reported Q4 EPS that topped estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.555 per share.

feed.title: Truist Trims Price Target on Booking Holdings to $5,780 ($231 Post Stock Split) From $5,810, Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist has slightly decreased its price target for Booking Holdings (BKNG) to $5,780, or $231 post-stock split, down from $5,810. Despite this adjustment, the firm has maintained its Buy rating on the online travel company's stock. This news reflects a minor revision in outlook while reaffirming a positive investment recommendation for Booking Holdings.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Royal Caribbean Group PT to $355 From $365, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) to $355 from $365, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a minor revision in the firm's valuation, despite keeping its positive outlook on the cruise company. The article also notes other recent analyst adjustments for Royal Caribbean.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts KKR & Co. Price Target to $110 From $145, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for KKR & Co. (KKR) to $110, down from $145, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a re-evaluation by the investment bank regarding KKR's future performance or valuation. The article also mentions KKR's recent closing of its largest-ever North America private equity fund, raising a record $23 billion.

feed.title: Where Will Super Micro Computer Stock Be in 5 Years?
feed.summary: This article discusses the future prospects of Super Micro Computer (SMCI) stock, emphasizing that despite its AI growth story, recent developments have made it a "credibility test." The Motley Fool's Stock Advisor team did not include SMCI in their top 10 stock recommendations, instead highlighting other companies with significant potential returns. The piece also notes that analyst Rick Orford has no position in the mentioned stocks, and The Motley Fool does not hold positions in them.

feed.title: GIBO (GIBO) CFO discloses initial holding of 35,662 Class A shares
feed.summary: GIBO HOLDINGS Ltd's CFO, Hung Kwan Chen, has filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) disclosing direct beneficial ownership of 35,662 Class A Ordinary Shares. This filing establishes a baseline for his holdings and does not indicate any buy or sell transactions. The report clarifies the nature of his ownership and defines key financial terms involved in the disclosure.

feed.title: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Avis Budget, Carvana, Dow, Kratos Defense, Netflix, Northern Trust, PayPay,Twilio, Tyson Foods and More
feed.summary: This article summarizes top Wall Street analyst research calls for Monday, April 6, 2026, covering upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for various companies like Netflix, Carvana, and Tyson Foods. It also provides a market overview, discussing futures trading mixed ahead of the first-quarter earnings season, the impact of non-farm payrolls, and the volatility in oil, gold, and crypto markets amidst ongoing geopolitical tensions and economic concerns.

feed.title: Last remaining Koss patent infringement suit reaches a verdict
feed.summary: The final patent infringement lawsuit brought by Koss Corp. against headphone manufacturers, initiated nearly six years ago, has concluded. A federal judge dismissed Koss's case against Skullcandy, marking the end of the legal battles also involving Apple Inc. and Bose Corp.

feed.title: AMD, Analog Devices get 30-day upside catalyst watches at Citi; Apple suppliers favored (AMD:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Citi has initiated 30-day upside catalyst watches on AMD and Analog Devices in anticipation of their upcoming quarterly earnings reports. The firm also expressed a positive outlook on two Apple suppliers, specifically mentioning Skyworks Solutions and Qualcomm in its analysis. These recommendations suggest potential short-term gains for investors in these semiconductor and technology stocks.

feed.title: Waycross Partners LLC Purchases 4,823 Shares of Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Waycross Partners LLC increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation by 3.2% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 4,823 shares to bring its total holdings to 157,180 shares valued at $76.015 million. Microsoft remains a heavily institutionally owned stock with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $588.97, despite facing geopolitical and security risks related to its AI initiatives. Insider transactions show a director acquiring shares while an EVP sold off a portion of their holdings.

feed.title: Wedge Capital Management L L P NC Lowers Stock Holdings in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Wedge Capital Management L L P NC reduced its stake in Microsoft Corporation by 6.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 9,208 shares and holding 131,115 shares valued at $63.41 million. Microsoft constitutes 1.1% of Wedge Capital's portfolio and is its tenth-largest holding. The article also provides details on insider trading, analyst ratings, and Microsoft's financial performance, including its recent earnings beat and dividend announcement.

feed.title: Microsoft Corporation $MSFT Shares Acquired by Wealthcare Advisory Partners LLC
feed.summary: Wealthcare Advisory Partners LLC increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) by 9.3% in Q4, with the software giant comprising 1.0% of its investment portfolio. The article highlights mixed signals for Microsoft, including positive AI catalysts like a reworked OpenAI deal and a significant paper gain, alongside security concerns and execution skepticism regarding AI monetization. Despite some price target cuts, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus, and Microsoft has declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. stock: Why it's drawing investor attention now
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) is attracting significant investor attention due to its strong position in AI and high-performance computing. The company's innovative chip designs and partnerships with foundries like TSMC position it for continued growth, especially in the booming data center and gaming sectors. While facing competitive and geopolitical risks, AMD's solid financial health and positive analyst sentiment suggest it is a key player for tech-focused portfolios.

feed.title: Cisco, Ciena And A Real Estate Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: Jim Lebenthal of Cerity Partners recommended Cisco Systems (NASDAQ: CSCO) on CNBC's 'Halftime Report Final Trades', citing its continued outperformance. Joshua Brown of Ritholtz Wealth Management picked Ciena Corporation (NYSE: CIEN), which hit an all-time high, while Malcolm Ethridge of Capital Area Planning Group chose Digital Realty Trust Inc (NYSE: DLR). Analysts reiterated Buy ratings and raised price targets for Cisco and Ciena.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT), alleging federal securities law violations. The lawsuit claims that FBRT and its officers made false or misleading statements regarding the company's prospects and its ability to maintain a $0.355 dividend. Investors who purchased FBRT securities between November 5, 2024, and February 11, 2026, are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of April 27, 2026.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley raises Seagate stock price target on HDD demand strength
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) shares to $582 from $468, maintaining an Overweight rating, due to strengthening hard disk drive (HDD) demand. The firm's analysis indicates HDD shortages extending through calendar year 2028 and a stronger-than-expected price per terabyte. Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) also saw an upward revision in its estimates and has achieved an 870% return over the past year, with analysts expressing growing confidence in the HDD sector's recovery.

feed.title: A Look At First Solar (FSLR) Valuation After Earnings Miss Backlog Strain And New US Facility Plan
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) recently reported earnings, missing EPS expectations but exceeding revenue forecasts, while also disclosing a shrinking backlog and new order cancellations. Despite this, management announced plans for a new U.S. solar cell finishing facility to capitalize on domestic incentives and align with growing utility-scale solar demand. The stock's valuation is complex, with one narrative suggesting it's 25.2% overvalued at $195.32 compared to a fair value of $155.98, yet another perspective, based on market multiples, indicates it could be undervalued given its P/E ratio of 13.7x versus a peer average of 70.6x.

feed.title: Analyst Downgrade: DOW Gets an 'Underperform' Rating from B of A Securities | DOW Stock News
feed.summary: Dow (DOW) has been downgraded to an 'Underperform' rating by B of A Securities, despite the price target being raised from $31.00 to $35.00. This mixed outlook follows several recent analyst upgrades and price target increases from other firms in late March 2026. The average target price from 16 analysts is $36.47, implying an 11.92% downside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $40.73, suggesting a 1.62% downside.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Sells 1,819 Shares of BlackRock $BLK
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC reduced its stake in BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) by 3.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 1,819 shares and maintaining 54,896 shares valued at $58.76 million. Despite recent insider selling, including significant transactions by directors, analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $1,298.78. BlackRock recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Biogen (BIIB) Expects $34 Million R&D Charge for Q1 2026
feed.summary: Biogen (BIIB) anticipates a $34 million pre-tax charge in Q1 2026 for acquired in-process research and development, which will reduce GAAP and non-GAAP net income per share by approximately $0.19. The biopharmaceutical company, focused on neurodegenerative and rare diseases, shows mixed financial signals with declining margins but strong financial health and appears modestly undervalued according to valuation metrics.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Sells 1,200 Shares of AutoZone, Inc. $AZO
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC reduced its stake in AutoZone, Inc. by 13.9% in Q4 2025, selling 1,200 shares and ending with 7,440 shares valued at $25.233 million. Concurrently, AutoZone VP Richard Craig Smith sold 5,910 shares for approximately $21.87 million, significantly decreasing his position. Despite these sales, analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for AZO, with a consensus price target of $4,312.13.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Sells 14,594 Shares of McKesson Corporation $MCK
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC decreased its stake in McKesson Corporation by 26.2% during the fourth quarter, selling 14,594 shares and retaining 41,175 shares valued at $33.78 million. Company insiders also sold 3,592 shares, including EVP Michele Lau's sale of 2,725 shares. McKesson exceeded quarterly EPS estimates with earnings of $9.34 and reported $106.16 billion in revenue, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a price target of approximately $961.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation $BAC Shares Sold by Rathbones Group PLC
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC recently trimmed its stake in Bank of America by 1.2%, selling 11,535 shares. While insiders have been net sellers, institutional ownership of BAC stock stands at about 70.71%, with some institutions significantly increasing their holdings. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Bank of America, with a consensus price target of $59.54.

feed.title: Runnymede Capital Advisors Inc. Invests $1.72 Million in AutoZone, Inc. $AZO
feed.summary: Runnymede Capital Advisors Inc. recently acquired 507 shares of AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) worth approximately $1.72 million, making it their 29th largest position. Despite an insider selling 5,910 shares for $21.87 million, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a target price of $4,312.13. AutoZone recently reported Q4 EPS of $27.63, slightly beating estimates, with an 8.2% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Sells 10,808 Shares of Xylem Inc. $XYL
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC decreased its holdings in Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL) by 2.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 10,808 shares and retaining 359,157 shares valued at $48.91 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Xylem, which recently announced a share buyback program of $1.50 billion and increased its quarterly dividend. The company's stock has a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $155.54.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Has $26.75 Million Stock Position in Applied Materials, Inc. $AMAT
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC reduced its stake in Applied Materials, Inc. by 21.8% in the fourth quarter, now holding 104,101 shares valued at $26.75 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their holdings, with 80.56% of the stock owned by institutions and hedge funds. Applied Materials recently reported strong quarterly earnings, exceeded analyst expectations, increased its dividend, and shows an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Sells 12,429 Shares of Johnson Controls International plc $JCI
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC reduced its stake in Johnson Controls International plc by 4.7% in the fourth quarter, selling 12,429 shares and holding 250,867 shares valued at $30,041,000. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in JCI. The article also provides details on the company's financial performance, dividend announcement, and recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Decreases Stock Position in Verisk Analytics, Inc. $VRSK
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC recently reduced its stake in Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) by 9.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 14,634 shares and ending up with 134,815 shares valued at approximately $30.16 million. This trimming comes as Verisk Analytics reported strong Q4 results, surpassing EPS and revenue estimates, setting optimistic FY2026 guidance, and implementing a significant share buyback program alongside a dividend increase. Despite the decreased holding by Rathbones, institutional ownership of Verisk remains high at around 90%, with analysts giving it a "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Has $10.09 Million Stake in First BanCorp. $FBP
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL significantly reduced its stake in First BanCorp. by 37.4%, now holding 457,398 shares valued at $10.09 million. Despite this, other institutions like Norges Bank and Boston Partners increased their positions, maintaining institutional ownership near 97.9%. First BanCorp. recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, and increased its quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $24.75.

feed.title: 242,016 Shares in Bio-Techne Corp $TECH Acquired by Tudor Investment Corp ET AL
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL has acquired a new stake of 242,016 shares in Bio-Techne Corp (NASDAQ:TECH) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $13.46 million. This acquisition represents about 0.16% of the biotechnology company, which recently reported Q3 earnings of $0.46 EPS against an expected $0.43 and revenue of $295.9 million. Bio-Techne maintains a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $72.77.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage Inc $EXR Shares Sold by Tudor Investment Corp ET AL
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp significantly reduced its stake in Extra Space Storage Inc ($EXR) during Q3, selling 22.5% of its shares. The CEO, Joseph D. Margolis, also sold a portion of his holdings, decreasing his position by over 10%. Extra Space Storage pays a quarterly dividend of $1.62, representing a 4.8% yield, but its dividend payout ratio is high at 140.87%.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Has $60.78 Million Stock Holdings in Danaher Corporation $DHR
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC reduced its stake in Danaher Corporation by 5.0% in the fourth quarter, selling 13,971 shares but still holding 265,499 shares valued at approximately $60.78 million. Danaher recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.40 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $1.60 and a yield of 0.8%. The company also exceeded Wall Street's Q4 earnings and revenue estimates, reporting $2.23 EPS and $6.84 billion in revenue with a positive consensus price target of $253.55 from analysts.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corporation $OTIS Shares Sold by Rathbones Group PLC
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC significantly reduced its stake in Otis Worldwide Corporation by 11.5% in Q4 2025, selling over 50,000 shares. This comes amidst other insider selling, with the CEO and other corporate insiders also offloading shares totaling millions of dollars. Otis reported Q4 EPS in line with estimates and maintains a "Hold" consensus analyst rating with a target price of $98.78.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Has $34.83 Million Stock Holdings in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC reduced its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. by 5.2% in the fourth quarter, now holding 242,663 shares valued at approximately $34.83 million. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors have increased their positions in PepsiCo. The article also provides details on PepsiCo’s stock performance, recent earnings, dividend announcement, and various analyst ratings and news sentiments.
